Résumé

Professional Summary

AI/ML data operations specialist with 7+ years improving virtual assistant accuracy, annotation quality, and UX across high-volume pipelines. Partners with ML, Product, and Localization to reduce error classes, tune taxonomies, and accelerate iteration via dashboards and QA rigor.

Core Skills

Annotation QAGuideline AuthoringInter-Annotator Agreement (IAA) Taxonomy GovernanceSampling/QC PlansExperiment DesignFriction Analysis TableauJira/ConfluenceJSON/CSVExcel (pivot/VLOOKUP)Basic SQL NLP/NLU/ASRPrompt EvaluationData QualityLocalization Nuance UX EvaluationPrivacy/PIIPythonCloudflare Pages

Experience

  1. Apple — Data Operations Analyst · Sep 2021–Jun 2024
    • Reviewed 500+ assistant interactions/day; applied linguistic tagging & QA to train NLP models, lifting accuracy across targeted domains.
    • Improved localization quality across en_US, en_CA, en_UK via nuance checks; refined prompts, intents, and fallbacks.
    • Built dashboards tracking throughput, error classes, and taxonomy drift for faster iteration.
  2. Apple — Technical Expert · Mar 2019–Sep 2021
    • Diagnosed recurring software faults via log analysis; reduced repeat visits by ~20%.
    • Mentored teammates with playbooks improving first-time resolution and triage speed.
  3. Apple — Business Development (Apple Pay) · Jan 2021–Jun 2021
    • Prospected 50+ e-merchants; led 20 integrations; supported SDK/API onboarding and testing.
    • Improved conversion via optimized integration paths and checkout messaging.
  4. Apple — iOS Technical Support Advisor · Mar 2020–Jan 2021
    • 90%+ same-call resolution over 2,000+ cases within 20 minutes, with minimal escalations.
    • Delivered precise documentation and education in case systems.
  5. Starbucks — Shift Lead · Sep 2016–May 2017
    Improved service speed by ~25% via training and queue design.
  6. Target — Front-End Lead · Aug 2015–Nov 2016
    Reduced queue times by ~30% through dynamic lane management.

Education

  • Concordia University Texas — B.A., Political Science & Psychology (In Progress)
  • University of Texas at Austin — Minor, Military Science (Army ROTC), 2017
  • Ennis High School — 2015

Certifications

  • Apple Certified iOS Technician (ACiT) — Active
  • Etiquette & Productivity, Slack — Credential ID: 30421184
